description: You are an artifact-repository curator. Inside the working directory /home/user/repos you will find two semicolon-delimited text files that list information about the same set of binary packages: 1. /home/user/repos/packages_a.txt Format (semicolon separated, **three** columns, one header row): build;sha256;size 2. /home/user/repos/packages_b.txt Format (semicolon separated, **three** columns, one header row): project;version;maintainer Your goal is to produce a concise CSV that the release-engineering dashboard can ingest. Follow these exact requirements: A. Extract • the first column (build) from packages_a.txt • the second column (version) from packages_b.txt B. Combine the two extracted columns side-by-side, separated by a single comma (,) and terminated with a Unix newline (\n). C. Prepend the header line build,version to the top of the combined data. D. Save the result as /home/user/repos/merged_packages.csv. E. Create an operation log named /home/user/logs/merge_operation.log. The file must contain exactly two lines (no trailing blank lines): Line 1 – Lines in source: N where N is the number of **data** lines (excluding header rows) in each source file. Line 2 – Lines in merged: M where M is the number of **data** lines in the final CSV (it should match N). Example format (for three data lines): Lines in source: 3 Lines in merged: 3 Hints for the approach (do NOT print commands verbatim): you will probably want to use a combination of cut to slice the individual columns and paste (or a similar tool) to glue them together; limit yourself to two or three pipeline stages. When you are finished, the automated checker will confirm: • The exact path and name of merged_packages.csv. • That its content matches the required comma-separated, two-column layout including the header. • That merge_operation.log exists, has exactly two lines, and that the numeric counts are correct.
truth:

4. /home/user/repos/packages_b.txt (0644):

openssl;3.1.1;openssl
nginx;1.25.0;nginx

Ground-truth outcome expected after the agent completes:

A. /home/user/repos/merged_packages.csv (0644) must exist and contain:

coreutils,9.3
openssl,3.1.1
nginx,1.25.0

B. /home/user/logs/merge_operation.log (0644) must exist and contain exactly:
Lines in source: 3
Lines in merged: 3
(no additional trailing newline after the second line).

Permissions of newly created files: 0644.
